name: Noodle Kugel
recipeIngredient: 1 pound or 12 oz wide egg noodles
2 tablespoons to 3 teaspoons butter or margarine (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Lightly grease a 9x13 inch pan.
2. Cook the noodles until about half done. Drain, and toss with butter or margarine, rinsing in cold water and draining again if desired. Transfer to a large bowl.
3. In a blender or food processor, combine eggs, cottage cheese, sour cream/yogurt, cream cheese, cinnamon, sugar, and salt. Whisk until smooth, in several batches if necessary. Stir into the noodles with any additional additions. Transfer to the baking pan.
4. Combine topping ingredients. Sprinkle over the top. Bake uncovered for about 40 minutes. Serve hot, warm, or at room temperature.
